targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS value FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE queued_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT coalesce(avg(functional_completion),0) AS value FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE queued_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE status='failed' AND queued_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE status='awaiting_approval'
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE status='running' AND heartbeat_at < now()-interval '2 minutes'

SELECT run_id,session_id,regexp_replace(user_id,'(^.).*(@.*$)','\1***\2') AS user_id,left(request,160) AS task,status,current_phase,technical_completion,functional_completion,user_visible_completion,side_effect_integrity,duration_ms,total_tokens,error_category,incident_summary->>'breaking_point' AS breaking_point,deployment_version,queued_at FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE queued_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY queued_at DESC LIMIT 250

SELECT run_id,sequence_no,title,service,tool_name,status,risk_level,requires_approval,duration_ms,error_category,error_message,started_at,completed_at FROM reporting.step_timeline ORDER BY coalesce(started_at,completed_at) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 500
SELECT * FROM reporting.improvement_queue ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT artifact_id,run_id,artifact_type,url,verification_status,sharing_state,cleanup_state,safe_to_delete,run_status,deployment_version,created_at FROM reporting.artifact_cleanup WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT day,error_category,status,runs,round(average_completion::numeric,1) AS avg_functional_completion FROM reporting.failure_summary_daily WHERE day BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY day DESC,runs DESC

SELECT day,model,component,status,calls,input_tokens,output_tokens,round(p95_ms::numeric,0) AS p95_ms FROM reporting.model_token_usage WHERE day BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY day DESC,calls DESC

SELECT day,tool_name,status,attempts,round(avg_ms::numeric,0) AS avg_ms,round(p95_ms::numeric,0) AS p95_ms FROM reporting.tool_reliability WHERE day BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY day DESC,attempts DESC

SELECT day,mode,requests,round(avg_returned::numeric,1) AS avg_returned,round(avg_used::numeric,1) AS avg_used,round(avg_ms::numeric,0) AS avg_ms FROM reporting.retrieval_quality WHERE day BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY day DESC,requests DESC

SELECT proposal_key,title,proposal_status,risk_level,canary_status,cohort,control_version,candidate_version,evaluation_passed,regressions,rollback_reason,started_at,ended_at FROM reporting.canary_evaluations ORDER BY coalesce(ended_at,started_at) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

SELECT name,prompt_name,status,arm,total_requests,round(avg_latency_ms::numeric,0) AS avg_latency_ms,round(avg_rating::numeric,2) AS avg_rating,round(avg_faithfulness::numeric,2) AS avg_faithfulness,round(avg_relevancy::numeric,2) AS avg_relevancy,round(error_rate_pct::numeric,2) AS error_rate_pct,round(completion_rate_pct::numeric,2) AS completion_rate_pct,winner FROM reporting.prompt_experiment_results ORDER BY coalesce(ended_at,started_at) DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT event_type,actor,status,occurred_at,CASE WHEN subject_user IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE regexp_replace(subject_user,'(^.).*(@.*$)','\1***\2') END AS subject_user,details FROM reporting.security_audit WHERE occurred_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 250

SELECT day,policy_name,policy_version,candidate,samples,round(task_success::numeric,3) AS task_success,round(plan_correctness::numeric,3) AS plan_correctness,round(tool_correctness::numeric,3) AS tool_correctness,round(artifact_correctness::numeric,3) AS artifact_correctness,round(recovery_success::numeric,3) AS recovery_success,round(side_effect_integrity::numeric,3) AS side_effect_integrity,round(user_satisfaction::numeric,3) AS user_satisfaction,round(retrieval_quality::numeric,3) AS retrieval_quality,round(avg_latency_ms::numeric,0) AS avg_latency_ms,round(avg_tokens::numeric,0) AS avg_tokens FROM reporting.workflow_evaluation WHERE day BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY day DESC,policy_version

SELECT id,run_id,regexp_replace(user_id,'(^.).*(@.*$)','\1***\2') AS user_id,artifact_type,external_id,action,status,cleanup_state,error_message,requested_at,completed_at FROM reporting.artifact_compensation ORDER BY requested_at DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT proposal_key,proposal_status,channel,event_type,status,external_reference,error_message,created_at,sent_at FROM reporting.improvement_notifications ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT incident_id,run_id,session_id,regexp_replace(user_id,'(^.).*(@.*$)','\1***\2') AS user_id,intent_kind,stage,category,component,service,operation,title,breaking_point,recommended_option,risk_level,analysis_status,created_at FROM reporting.failure_intelligence WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 250
SELECT cluster_key,stage,category,component,service,operation,occurrences,awaiting_review,first_seen,last_seen FROM reporting.failure_cluster_summary ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT incident_id,cluster_key,title,analysis_status,channel,event_type,status,external_reference,error_message,created_at,sent_at FROM reporting.failure_notifications ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 250
